mapper.select: SELECT id, synonym_text, object_type, object_code, standard_name, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_synonym WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, synonym_text, object_type, object_code, standard_name, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_synonym WHERE synonym_text = #{synonymText} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT object_code FROM agent.dsl_synonym WHERE is_deleted = false AND embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vector}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
